Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Amending Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jordan E. Scott, esq. (415-981-5411) of Bledsoe...LLP for Defendant.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHELLE HO's Motion For Order Amending Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc is Granted. No opposition filed.
